statement.p: Sammy puts a pot of water from the tap onto the stove and turns the burner all the way up. The water temperature starts at 13\,^{\circ}C and climbs steadily up to the boiling point of 100\,^{\circ}C\text{,} raising at a rate of 15\,\frac{^{\circ}C}{\text{min}}\text{.} How long will it take for the pot to boil? Write an equation to model this scenario. There is no need to solve it.
